api/services/financial_calc.py Deterministic financial statement calculations us
Full audit record for a single financial calculation.
One-line display string for the AI to cite verbatim.
Result of an accounting identity check.
Format a raw USD value as a compact string for formula display.
Normalize XBRL unit-scaled values to raw USD.      XBRL sometimes reports in tho
EBITDA = Operating Income + D&A  (approximation from GAAP components)
Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities
Quick Ratio = (Cash + ST Investments + Receivables) / Current Liabilities
Net Debt = Total Debt - Cash & Equivalents
Working Capital = Current Assets - Current Liabilities
Book Value Per Share = Equity / Shares Outstanding
Free Cash Flow = Operating Cash Flow - Capital Expenditures
FCF Margin % = Free Cash Flow / Revenue * 100
FCF Conversion = Free Cash Flow / Net Income (quality signal)

langgraph_engine.py — Deterministic RAG DAG for SEC filings.  Nodes: Retrieval
Strict TypedDict state matching the JSON payload expected by the React app.
Node 1: Retrieve relevant text chunks from the SEC filing.
Node 2: Extract structured XBRL facts using Polars.
Node 3: Route to the right Polars financial calculator based on query intent.
Node 4: Verify the math result against the source text (retrieved docs).
Final Node: Format the successful answer.
Fallback Node: Handle verification failures or missing data.
Deterministic routing based on verification result.
Run the LangGraph DAG for a given query and ticker.
Run all four retrievers sequentially and merge results.
